appearance.title: Appearance

info.title: Theme Info
info.system: System default will match your OS preference.
info.custom: Custom: Loaded from .json files in your app data folder.

appearance.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this theme?

behavior.title: App Behavior
behavior.auto_close_desc: Automatically close EMMM completely when you successfully launch a game.

games.title: Games Library
games.desc: Manage your install locations and game configurations.
games.empty: No games configured. Click "Add Game" to get started.

actions.scan_success: Scan complete! Found {{new}} new mods and {{updated}} updates.

games.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this game configuration?

form.path_help: Select the folder where you store your Mods.

ai.title: AI Intelligent Reranking
ai.desc: When enabled, EMMM will use an LLM via the provided OpenAI-compatible endpoint to attempt recovery of mod folders that were marked as "Needs Review" by the local scoring pipeline.
ai.api_key_desc: This key is stored locally and sent only to the configured base URL.

browser.title: Discover & Browser
browser.homepage_desc: The default page opened when you click Discover (must start with http/https).
browser.auto_analysis_desc: When a mod finishes downloading, automatically extract and deep-match it. If disabled, imports must be started manually.
browser.skip_picker_desc: If you only have one game configured, skip the Game Picker modal and import instantly.
browser.extensions_desc: Comma-separated list of extensions the browser is allowed to download.
browser.custom_dir_desc: Leave empty to use the default app data location. Restart required if changed.
browser.retention_desc: How long to keep downloaded archives before automatic cleanup.

hotkeys.title: Global Hotkeys
hotkeys.desc: System-wide keyboard shortcuts for quick actions while gaming. These shortcuts are intercepted when the game window is active.
hotkeys.viewer_desc: Automatically generates and manages in-game keybind lists based on the character/object currently detected via 3DMigoto hashes. Toggled along with the Status Banner using {{key}}.
hotkeys.infrastructure_desc: Artifacts are managed in .emmm_data/. No user configuration required for deployment.

maintenance.trash_desc: Permanently remove deleted mods to free up disk space.
maintenance.trash_confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all items in the Trash?
maintenance.system_desc: Run automated cleanup tasks, verify database integrity, and prune orphaned metadata.
maintenance.cache_desc: Remove old generated thumbnails (older than 30 days) to save space. They will be regenerated as needed.
maintenance.danger_desc: Clear all game registrations, mod metadata, and settings from the database. The application will return to the initial setup screen. A backup of the database will be saved to the trash folder.
maintenance.danger_info: Your mod files and folders on disk will not be deleted.
maintenance.modal_body: This will clear all game registrations, mod metadata, collections, and settings from the database. A backup will be saved to the trash folder before clearing.
maintenance.modal_error: You will need to set up the application again.

update.title: Application Updates
update.latest: You are on the latest version.
update.metadata_desc: Synchronize character and weapon databases from the remote server. This happens automatically on startup but can also be triggered manually.

privacy.title: Corridor & Safe Mode
privacy.desc: Safe Mode (Corridor) hides sensitive mods from the UI. Transitioning out of Safe Mode requires a PIN check if configured.
privacy.protection_desc: When enabled, mods not matching the current corridor's whitelist will be forcefully disabled on launch.
privacy.security_status_none: No PIN set. Transitioning is unprotected.
privacy.security_modal_set_desc: Creating a PIN will protect transitions and sensitive settings.
privacy.security_modal_unlock_desc: Enter your current PIN to continue.

logs.title: System Logs
logs.empty: No log entries match the selected level.
